analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet reports that China’s Wang Yi and Russia’s Lavrov reached consensus to combat disinformation, calling on governments and media to coordinate and reject disinformation. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent): Not explicit—no direct reference to the West/US as hostile or immoral. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—the tweet presents China (with Russia) as acting cooperatively for a global good (combating disinformation), urging international coordination, which fits China’s portrayal as supporting order and responsible multilateral action. CH3 (Epic history): Not relevant. CH4 (Appropriate political system and honorable values): Not directly—no domestic political system advocacy; the focus is international conduct. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No performance/achievement claims. CH6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
